{{Infobox character
| name = King of the Iron Legion
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[King of the Iron Legion]] is a ten-foot-tall human-like figure wrapped in chrome armor with cybernetic and mystical connections.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion]] [[King]]'s body was lost due to the disruption of a ritual.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[King of the Iron Legion]] was once affected by [[Absolute Burial]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
